L5-EMP-01.do_en: Run customer-facing end-to-end deployments at a robotics middleware company. Bring the platform onto customer robots and fleets. Handle integration and hardware prototyping.
L5-EMP-01.week_en: Monday: meet customers. Tuesday to Thursday: integrate the platform and bring fleets online. Friday: deliver, feed back to product, and travel sometimes.
L5-EMP-01.entry_time_en: 0-3 months with a software or integration background
L5-EMP-01.barrier_en: Requires software ability. Some travel needed.
L5-EMP-01.risk_en: Platform self-service features reduce the headcount needed for deployment.
L5-EMP-01.next_en: 12-24 months to solutions lead or fleet integration consultant (L5-MICRO-01).

L5-EMP-02.do_en: Write ROS2 software covering navigation, Nav2, integration, and SDKs. Open to self-taught and bootcamp software backgrounds. No PhD required.
L5-EMP-02.week_en: Monday: plan the schedule. Tuesday to Thursday: write and debug ROS2 features and integration. Friday: review, test, and release.
L5-EMP-02.entry_time_en: 3-9 months to self-learn ROS2 to a hireable level
L5-EMP-02.barrier_en: Requires solid software ability and a portfolio. A PhD is not required.
L5-EMP-02.next_en: 12-24 months to senior, middleware lead, or freelance ROS2 developer (L5-SOLO-01).

L5-EMP-03.name_en: Robotics Technical / Application Support Engineer (AMR Fleets)
L5-EMP-03.do_en: Provide after-sales technical support for AMR fleets. Handle CI/CD deployment, troubleshooting, and customer support.
L5-EMP-03.week_en: Monday to Friday: handle customer tickets, deploy updates, and troubleshoot remotely. Escalate critical issues. Send product feedback back.
L5-EMP-03.next_en: 12-24 months to solutions or deployment engineer (L5-EMP-01).

L5-EMP-04.name_en: Robotics DevOps/SRE and Functional Safety Engineer
L5-EMP-04.do_en: Run DevOps, SRE, and functional safety for safety-critical robotics stacks. Build deployment pipelines and V&V. Support safety certification.
L5-EMP-04.week_en: Monday to Thursday: maintain deployment and CI, run V&V and safety cases, and monitor. Friday: write compliance docs and release.
L5-EMP-04.entry_time_en: 3-6 months with a DevOps or embedded background
L5-EMP-04.barrier_en: Requires DevOps skills plus safety methodology.
L5-EMP-04.risk_en: The safety market depends on regulatory progress.
L5-EMP-04.next_en: 12-24 months to safety or platform engineering lead.

L5-SOLO-01.do_en: Take ROS and ROS2 contracts on Upwork and Arc.dev. Work covers SLAM, PX4, and autonomous navigation.
L5-SOLO-01.week_en: Monday: bid on jobs. Tuesday to Thursday: write and debug ROS2 code. Friday: deliver, demo, and review.
L5-SOLO-01.entry_time_en: 1-3 months to build a profile and case studies
L5-SOLO-01.barrier_en: Requires a portfolio. Platforms take a cut.
L5-SOLO-01.risk_en: AI-assisted coding pushes prices down. Offshore competition adds pressure.
L5-SOLO-01.next_en: 12-24 months to fleet integration consultant (L5-MICRO-01) or employment (L5-EMP-02).

L5-SOLO-02.do_en: Build and publish modules or panels on the Viam Registry or Foxglove extension marketplace. Viam handles billing. Earn distribution income or consulting leads.
skills_must_en: Viam component/service API or Foxglove SDK
L5-SOLO-02.week_en: Monday to Wednesday: build and test modules or extensions. Thursday: publish and write docs. Friday: track adoption and take consulting or custom work.
L5-SOLO-02.barrier_en: Paid distribution is early-stage. Monetization is uncertain.
L5-SOLO-02.risk_en: Paid distribution mechanisms are immature. Platform policy can change.
L5-SOLO-02.next_en: 12-24 months to a vertical SaaS built on the platform (L5-MICRO-02).

L5-SOLO-03.do_en: Maintain open-source robotics middleware such as dora-rs or ROS packages. Earn through GitHub Sponsors, consulting, and bounties.
L5-SOLO-03.week_en: Monday to Wednesday: develop, maintain, and handle issues and PRs. Thursday: release. Friday: take consulting and maintain the sponsor page.
L5-SOLO-03.barrier_en: Requires systems programming skills. Sponsorship scales slowly.
L5-SOLO-03.risk_en: Pure OSS is hard to monetize. Large firms dominate the space.
L5-SOLO-03.next_en: 12-24 months to recruitment by a middleware company or a commercial project.

L5-MICRO-01.do_en: Run a 1-5 person studio deploying Formant or InOrbit fleet operations and teleoperation for customers. Do cloud robotics integration.
L5-MICRO-01.week_en: Monday: meet customers. Tuesday to Thursday: integrate and deploy fleet operations. Friday: deliver, maintain, and discuss renewals or new deals.
L5-MICRO-01.barrier_en: Requires platform expertise plus customer relationships.
L5-MICRO-01.risk_en: Platform self-service grows. Customers build their own teams.
L5-MICRO-01.next_en: 12-24 months to a regional robotics integration services firm.

L5-MICRO-02.do_en: Run a 1-5 person team building a vertical robotics SaaS app on Viam or Formant. Charge customers for it.
L5-MICRO-02.week_en: Monday: review user feedback. Tuesday to Thursday: build vertical app features. Friday: ship, onboard customers, and market.
L5-MICRO-02.entry_time_en: 3-6 months to an MVP and first customers
L5-MICRO-02.barrier_en: Requires platform plus app development skills and vertical customers.
L5-MICRO-02.risk_en: Platform policy or pricing can change. Vertical demand may be limited.
L5-MICRO-02.next_en: 12-24 months to a vertical robotics SaaS company.
